summary: Email PDF matching frontend PDF - All 9 tests passed. Verified customer_code and customer_company fields are returned by API, generate_quote_html includes all required fields (customer_code, customer_company, original_rfq_number, approved_at, pricing breakdown, T&Cs), and quote approval workflow sends email with properly formatted PDF attachment. Fixed a bug where generate_quote_html crashed when customer_details was None.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing RFQs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email PDF matching frontend PDF feature is fully functional. All customer fields (customer_code, customer_company), pricing breakdown (subtotal, discount, packing, shipping), T&Cs, and approval date are correctly included in email PDF. Fixed a bug at line 994 in server.py where customer_details could be None.

test_3_get_quotes_returns_customer_field.details: API returns customer_code and customer_company fields. Found 85 quotes, 53 with customer_code, 44 with customer_company

test_4_get_single_quote_has_customer_fie.details: Single quote API returns customer_code: C0001, customer_company: Acme Corp

test_5_pending_rfq_has_customer_fields.details: Pending RFQs have customer_code and customer_company fields

test_6_generate_quote_html_contains_cust.details: generate_quote_html includes customer_code, customer_company, original_rfq_number, pricing breakdown, T&Cs

test_7_generate_quote_html_without_custo.details: generate_quote_html works correctly when customer_details is None (after bug fix)

test_8_find_pending_rfq_for_approval.details: Found 15 pending RFQs available for approval

test_9_approve_rfq_workflow.details: RFQ RFQ/25-26/0022 approved as Q/25-26/0037. Email sent with PDF attachment containing all required fields

verified_fixes: Quote model has customer_code and customer_company fields (Line 296-297)
generate_quote_html uses customer_code and customer_company correctly (Line 991-996, 1368-1369)
send_quote_approval_email receives complete quote data including customer_code and customer_company (Line 3078-3097)
Bug fix: customer_details None handling at line 994 (changed from {} default to `or {}` fallback)

email_confirmation.log_entry: Quote approval email sent with PDF for: Q/25-26/0037
